user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a log of past imports with module, function, date, importer, and status, so that I can audit import activity
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Import Data Log screen; When the log loads; Then each entry shows Module, Function, Import Date and Time, Imported By, and Status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see record counts per import (All, Success, Failed, Skipped), so that I can assess the outcome of each import
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing the import log; When I inspect an entry's status; Then it shows All Records, Success Records, Failed Records, and Skipped Records counts

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the log, so that I can see the latest import results without reloading the page
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Import Data Log screen; When I click refresh; Then the log is updated with the most recent import entries

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the import log, so that I can browse the full history of imports
acceptance_criteria: Given the log contains many entries; When I use the pagination controls (next, last, page numbers); Then the corresponding page of import records is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to navigate from the log back to the Import Data screen, so that I can start a new import quickly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Import Data Log screen; When I select Import Data; Then I am taken to the Import Data screen
